diagrams.title: Navigation Component Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how NavHostFragment, NavController, and Navigation Graph work together
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the data flow and relationships between Navigation Component parts

diagrams.title: Fragment Transaction Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows the lifecycle of fragment navigation including add, replace, and back stack operations
diagrams.purpose: Understand when lifecycle methods are called during navigation operations

diagrams.title: Deep Linking Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the flow from external URI to app destination
diagrams.purpose: Understand how deep links resolve to specific app content
